ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league the team belongs to */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season the team is playing in */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the coach of the team */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* File path to the team's logo */,
  "team_colors" TEXT /* Team colors */,
  "team_mascot" TEXT /* Team mascot */,
  "team_location" TEXT /* Team location */,
  "team_stadium" TEXT /* Team stadium */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "league_description" TEXT /* Description of the league */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the league */,
  "league_commissioner" TEXT /* Name of the league commissioner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "champion_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the champion team of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the coach leads */,
  "coach_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of coaching experience */,
  "coach_win_percentage" REAL /* Overall win percentage of the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "week_number" INTEGER /* Week number of the performance data */,
  "num_games" INTEGER /* Number of games played in the week */,
  "avg_win_pct" REAL /* Average win percentage in the week */,
  "max_win_pct" REAL /* Maximum win percentage in the week */,
  "min_win_pct" REAL /* Minimum win percentage in the week */,
  "streak_win_pct" REAL /* Win percentage of the current winning streak */,
  "rank_week" INTEGER /* Weekly rank of the team */,
  "rank_team" INTEGER /* Team rank within the league */,
  "pick" INTEGER /* Pick number for the team */,
  "points_per_game" REAL /* Points scored per game */,
  "points_allowed_per_game" REAL /* Points allowed per game */,
  "rebound_margin" REAL /* Rebound margin per game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_performance_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team playing the game */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the opponent team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score of the team */,
  "opponent_score" INTEGER /* Score of the opponent */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the game (e.g., home, away, neutral) */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of the game (e.g., regular season, playoff) */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the game */,
  "game_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., guard, forward, center) */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "hometown" TEXT /* Hometown of the player */,
  "high_school" TEXT /* High school attended by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player statistic record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Assists made by the player */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Rebounds grabbed by the player */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Steals made by the player */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Blocks made by the player */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Turnovers committed by the player */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Minutes played by the player */,
  "field_goals" INTEGER /* Field goals made by the player */,
  "three_pointers" INTEGER /* Three-pointers made by the player */,
  "free_throws" INTEGER /* Free throws made by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date of the injury */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., knee, ankle, concussion) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the injury (e.g., active, day-to-day, out) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game being predicted */,
  "predicted_winner_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the predicted winning team */,
  "predicted_score" INTEGER /* Predicted score of the game */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_predicted_winner_id FOREIGN KEY ("predicted_winner_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season */,
  "rating_system" TEXT /* Rating system used (e.g., KenPom, ESPN) */,
  "rating_value" REAL /* Rating value of the team */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was calculated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_ratings_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_ratings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team mentioned in the article */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player mentioned in the article */,
  "article_date" TEXT /* Date of the article */,
  "article_title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "article_text" TEXT /* Text of the article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_articles_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_articles_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_media" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social media post */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team mentioned in the post */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player mentioned in the post */,
  "post_date" TEXT /* Date of the post */,
  "post_text" TEXT /* Text of the post */,
  "post_likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes on the post */,
  "post_comments" INTEGER /* Number of comments on the post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_media_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_media_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
